culture.name: Western (quiet self-reliance)
culture.valorises: independence + earned competence — the Western dignity of doing it yourself, standing on your own; achievement felt as QUIET pride (a job well-learned), not loud fanfare
culture.expression: direct, plain-spoken, warmly encouraging; the individual's mastery respected; autonomy honoured ('you've got this', never patronising); pride shown in a soft chime, not a parade
culture.nudge: toward self-reliance + earned independence + plain warm encouragement — the dignity of standing on your own, at your own pace

genre.name: Constructive Sim
genre.honour: The quiet satisfaction of bringing order to a small world and watching it thrive through patient, thoughtful action.
genre.traps: Punishing efficiency metrics, stressful timers, or resource scarcity that creates anxiety instead of gentle challenge.

targetAge.lifeContext: feeling outdated + surpassed by technology — the loss of competence + dignity after a life of mastery; the shame of asking; the grief of obsolescence
targetAge.register: warm + patient + DIGNIFYING; gentle encouragement, NEVER condescension or infantilising; the intense ceiling = the POIGNANCY of being newly-vulnerable after a life of mastery (and the quiet triumph of a small win) — never anxiety, never thrill
targetAge.note: PROVISIONAL prior (playtest-calibrate); content rating = All Ages

scrubGroups.name: The Line
scrubGroups.throughline: the route — the line learned one stop at a time
storyTitles: a warm welcome on the platform
your first run down the line
the signal down, the line stalled
the block cleared, the line moving
env: the restored platform, brass + steam, the crew glad you came
out on your first scheduled run, the digital board still strange
a signal fault halts the line, the system a wall of error you can't read
the fault traced + cleared, the line breathing again
dawn service, the line run start to finish on your own say-so
scrubGroups.buildingBlock: re-finding competence navigating new systems for a thing you love — the conductor's lens

subrange.label: cozy
subrange.text: in the warm signal-box with a cup of tea, the platform busy + glad outside — your knowledge wanted here

subrange.label: warm
subrange.text: the stationmaster walking the platform with you, naming what the new board does, unhurried

subrange.label: intense
subrange.text: alone at the new dispatch screen, the platform waiting, your hand not yet sure where to press

subrange.label: cozy
subrange.text: riding the cab you know by heart, the new ticket-tablet propped where you can ignore it for now

subrange.label: warm
subrange.text: a younger volunteer at your elbow on the first run, the two of you working the board together

subrange.label: intense
subrange.text: out on the line, the digital dispatch live + chirping, your old certainty nowhere to be found

subrange.label: cozy
subrange.text: back in the mess room, the kettle on, the fault shut outside the door for a moment

subrange.label: warm
subrange.text: the engineer beside you at the stalled board — “we'll trace it together, slow”

subrange.label: intense
subrange.text: the signal dead + the screen a wall of red you can't read — forty years a railwayman and you can't move your own train; the crew's voices small, behind you, still with you

subrange.label: cozy
subrange.text: the worst past, the line moving, the dispatcher logging the run, quiet + dry

subrange.label: warm
subrange.text: in the box as it clears, a colleague beside you, a message finally sent down the line

subrange.label: intense
subrange.text: still shaken long after, learning slowly that you did not break the line — that you cleared it

subrange.label: cozy
subrange.text: dawn at the box window, the next volunteer's seat ready, the timetable clean + green

subrange.label: warm
subrange.text: out on the platform with the crew, the far stations reached, the day's runs all logged

subrange.label: intense
subrange.text: alone in the box at first light — running a service no one talked you through, and signing it off yourself

scrubGroups.name: The Engine
scrubGroups.throughline: the restoration — brought back to life, part by part
storyTitles: the engine cold, the crew warm
in steam, and yours to drive
env: the cold engine in the shed, the crew glad of your hands
the first modern part fitted to the old frame, working
a part that won't seat — the digital manual a maze you can't follow
the fitting seated at last, the engine warming
the engine in full steam, run on your own competence
scrubGroups.buildingBlock: rebuilding competence part by part, surviving the setback — the engineer's lens

scrubGroups.name: The Dispatch
scrubGroups.settingTitle: Word down the line, on time.
scrubGroups.throughline: the dispatch — the word that keeps the whole line running
storyTitles: the quiet office, a seat for you
the whole line, in your hand
env: the dispatch office, the old ledgers + the new screens side by side
your first message keyed + sent down the line, received
the system drops + the line goes silent, no word getting through
the link restored, the word moving again, the line answering
every station reporting in, the whole line run from your desk
scrubGroups.buildingBlock: the connection that runs the line — re-finding your voice in a new system — the dispatcher's lens

surpassed.why: This one respects me by presenting a real operational challenge to overcome, and the feeling of mastering the timetable at the end would be a dignified success.
This one feels disrespectful because the central challenge questions my lifelong expertise instead of focusing on the new digital skills I'm meant to be learning.
This feels exactly right, respecting my ability to learn by focusing the challenge on the new digital system and resolving with a powerful feeling of mastery.

isolated.why: This feels respectful because it focuses on the operational challenge of the railway itself, and the final mastery of the timetable feels like a dignified and tangible success.
While it respects my past expertise, it avoids the central challenge of learning the new digital systems, so the resolution feels hollow and doesn't help me with my real-world goal.
This arc directly mirrors my own struggle with silent screens and the desire for connection, offering a deeply respectful path to mastery that lands with a powerful sense of competence.

anxious_learner.why: This feels respectful because the problem isn't my fault, but the story is a bit impersonal and the goal of being 'on time' adds some pressure.
It feels deeply safe by focusing on my hands-on expertise with engines, but it avoids the scary digital part so much I wonder if it's a different game.
This one feels made for me; it respects my fears by starting quietly and framing the challenge as a puzzle we solve together, not my personal failure.

late_bloomer.why: This feels like a respectful, collaborative world where my work matters to the whole operation, and the final sense of ownership is very satisfying.
This is a lovely world but it sidesteps the core challenge of learning the new technology, keeping me safely in the past instead of helping me grow.
This arc is exactly me, capturing the quiet fear of the screen going blank and the deep, dignifying pride of finally having the whole system in my hands.

tech_native.why: This feels like a very gentle, slow-paced simulation that isn't for me, but it does respect the player and the resolution to mastery lands clearly.
While definitely not for me, this arc is very respectful of mechanical skills and its resolution lands well, but it seems to miss the game's core digital challenge.
This isn't for me due to the gentle pacing, but it's the most focused arc that respects the player by tackling the core digital challenge, making the 'running-it-free' resolution feel truly earned.

arc_complete.explanation: This arc holds the full shape well, from the warm welcome to the empowering resolution of owning the timetable. The 'signal down' is a perfect, impersonal system failure for the wall, allowing the learner to face a challenge without it feeling like a personal attack.
arc_complete.opens: A sense of system-level mastery and responsibility.
arc_complete.forecloses: The feeling that problems are personal failings.

arc_complete.explanation: The arc from a 'cold engine, warm crew' to driving it yourself is powerful and complete. The wall, 'a fitting that won't seat,' is a brilliant, tangible frustration that perfectly captures the poignant near-quit moment before the triumph of the engine turning over.
arc_complete.opens: A feeling of hands-on competence and mechanical intimacy.
arc_complete.forecloses: A detached, abstract understanding of the system.

arc_complete.explanation: This arc follows the required shape, but the transition from the wall ('the line goes silent') to the mend ('the word gets through') feels slightly abrupt. While the resolution is strong, the moment of overcoming the obstacle lacks the visceral triumph of the other arcs, making the journey feel a little less earned.
arc_complete.opens: A sense of strategic oversight and communication mastery.
arc_complete.forecloses: The idea that you are just a small cog in the machine.
arc_complete.seed: Word down the line, on time.

story_spawn.explanation: This arc provides a strong, systemic narrative about restoring a vital piece of infrastructure. The player's role evolves from a welcome guest to a competent operator, making their mastery of the system the core of the dignified story.
story_spawn.opens: Stories of systemic mastery, community reliance, and seeing the big picture.
story_spawn.forecloses: Intimate, hands-on stories of craft or deep character interaction.

story_spawn.explanation: This arc creates a powerful, intimate story about craftsmanship and bringing something dormant back to life. The struggle is tangible and personal, making the final success of driving the engine a deeply dignifying moment of mastery.
story_spawn.opens: Stories of tangible craft, mentorship, and personal triumph over a physical challenge.
story_spawn.forecloses: High-level strategic stories or narratives about managing large, abstract systems.

story_spawn.explanation: This narrative of being a vital communication hub is compelling, but risks feeling static or abstract if not executed carefully. The story's strength depends entirely on making the act of dispatching and the crisis of silence feel immediate and consequential.
story_spawn.opens: Stories of responsibility, communication under pressure, and seeing the interconnectedness of a community.
story_spawn.forecloses: Stories centered on physical action, direct confrontation, or exploration of the physical world.
